body_transformation: The serpentine body now bears molten gold scales that ripple with heat distortion, replacing the gray and white pattern with deep crimson and burnt orange hues. Black markings transform into jagged magma-cracked textures glowing with amber light along the spine and underbelly. The red eye deepens to a molten core glow with a charcoal outline, while sharp teeth become polished obsidian shards edged in ember sparks. A faint trail of smoke curls from the joints and tail tip, matching the heat-haze distortion around the coiled form.
signature_feature: Tail tip: molten gold flame with ember-scaled armor plating and glowing crimson fissures.
